query:
SELECT fa.id, fa.dealerId, fa.inventoryItemId, fa.status, ii.brand, ii.model, ii.year, ii.price 
FROM facebookAds fa 
LEFT JOIN inventoryItems ii ON fa.inventoryItemId = ii.id 
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2F4gXNdSiMoWnF9.7c8a24292ad0 --database RzTEWttBsCe6CWwBvFPaLT --execute SELECT fa.id, fa.dealerId, fa.inventoryItemId, fa.status, ii.brand, ii.model, ii.year, ii.price 
FROM facebookAds fa

LIMIT 5;
